NAVAREA XIX 14/24
 1.THE FOLLOWING MESSAGE IS ONLY FOR DEMONSTRATION PURPOSE IN THE OCEAN 
 RESEARCH PROJECT AND IS NOT AN OPERATIONAL SERVICE IN NAVAERA XIX.

 DUE TO WEATHER CONDITIONS CONTAINER VESSELS SHOULD TAKE APPROPRIATE 
 MEASURES TO AVOID LOSING CONTAINERS.

 2.CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 240900 UTC FEB 24
